summary: Excellent audience recording captures a solid first set and standout China Rider and The Other One moments despite a mixed second half.
review: The tape is praised for its sweet‑spot placement, punchy presence and an immersive ‘being there’ feel that makes it one of the best recordings of this 1984 show. Musically the first set is solid and the second set delivers highlights like China Rider and a memorable The Other One jam, though some listeners find the latter half a bit sloppy.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews overwhelmingly rate the recording highly and note strong musical performance with several standout moments; only minor criticism of the second set reduces the overall score slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captures the sweet spot, punchy mids and an immersive ‘being there’ feel; clear and well‑balanced despite being a crowd source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid throughout, second set has mixed reception but shines with China Rider and an inspired The Other One jam; overall a well‑played show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His second solo after Bobby is described as ‘obliterating’ the remaining energy – a powerful highlight.
band_member_comments.Bob: Provides solid rhythm/vocals before Jerry’s explosive solo.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland is energized by a pre‑song scream and delivers strong keyboard work throughout the set.
